description: No Message-ID header is present on an otherwise clean, trusted, all-passing message. messageIdDomain is null and messageIdDomainMatchesFromDomain is null, so the consistency comparison is skipped and no messageId.domainMismatch signal is emitted. Confirms missing input stays silent rather than producing a noisy low-confidence signal.

authentication-results: mx.example.net; dmarc=pass header.from=example.com; spf=pass smtp.mailfrom=example.com; dkim=pass header.d=example.com

authenticationResults.raw: mx.example.net; dmarc=pass header.from=example.com; spf=pass smtp.mailfrom=example.com; dkim=pass header.d=example.com
